resources.string: Organize handwriting capture and OCR with a focused, step-by-step flow.
ClearScript helps students and professionals capture difficult handwriting, clean the image, and produce readable text quickly.
Use Scan for camera capture or Import for a gallery image. Keep the page flat and fully visible before continuing.
Adjust contrast and cleanup options to improve legibility. Better preprocessing gives more accurate text extraction.
Start Scan to process the image with Default AI. Follow stage progress until completion.
Inspect confidence feedback and the extracted text. Use this screen to quickly validate whether another capture is needed.
Open History to switch between list and card views, update titles, and delete records you no longer need.
Use even lighting, avoid shadows across words, and keep your camera parallel to the page for best OCR quality.
